title: pyrus teodori
intro: Pyrus teodori, also known as the Korean mountain ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The medicinal properties of Pyrus teodori include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Pyrus teodori include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Pyrus teodori can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Korean medicine to treat various health conditions.
